title: Amendment of limitation imposed on severance payment and
content:
long service payment
The Legislative Council may, by resolution published in the 
Gazette, amend the references to $22,500 in— (Amended 4 of 2022 
s. 18)
	
(a)	
sections 31G and 31V (including those sections as 
modified by Schedule 11);
	
(b)	
this section; and
	
(c)	
sections 7 and 8 of Schedule 2 to the Protection of 
Wages on Insolvency Ordinance (Cap. 380),
by substituting a different amount specified in the resolution.
(Replaced 41 of 1990 s. 22. Amended L.N. 264 of 1995; 4 of 2022 
s. 18)
